subcodes.first_line: O patient servant of God! Though the calamity of thy loving mother is grievous indeed, and separation from friends and loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صبور الهی هر چند مصیبت مادر مهربان عظیم است و فرقت یاران و دوستان و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
